{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Akura forces
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Most of the [[Akura forces]] were located inside the fortress walls in Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
